title: The Viscosity Measurement
description: Decide which partner provides the most information (maximum entropy) when mixed with the target ingredient.

hints.text: The most informative mix partner for ing7 is the one whose result is most unpredictable — more distinct possible outcomes means more information gained from the experiment, since each result rules out different alchemicals.

Partners ranked by number of possible outcomes:
  ing2: 5 distinct results (B-, B+, G-, G+, R-)
  ing3: 5 distinct results (B+, G-, R-, R+, neutral)
  ing5: 5 distinct results (B+, G+, R-, R+, neutral) ← most informative
  ing1: 4 distinct results (B-, B+, G+, R+)
  ing4: 4 distinct results (B-, G-, R+, neutral)
  ing8: 4 distinct results (B-, G+, R+, neutral)
Most informative partner for ing7: ing5.
